ab: itiza fuifuilh patashan a shinshii munai.
en: The teacher is here.

ab: ingqaiza malhalhiqash, iahiaw ushai mihu a pangka milhungqu.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: ripay rima thuini, pangqaiza simaq, musuun ita kilhnaqualh!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!
Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: ripay turu simaq, musuun ita matinhina sa maqarimusuz ya simaq saqazi!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: numa s kalawan uhu simaq a shashanu?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: amuntal iaku naak a ina, mutusi balinuqaz a taun.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?
I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: shinshii, makashpar naak a tiaz, amutusiwak puthaqian.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.

ab: qazii iaku musui mashinaw rima qa?
en: May I go wash my hands?
It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: shinshii, mathuaw makashpar naak a punuq, apangqawak ya saqazi.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: shinshii, apangqawak ya ripay tata, maqa amariqaz iaku mriqariqaz shiz a shinshii.
ch: A:老師，我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.

ab: ua, piakakalinkin s mihu a buut.
en: Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Apin?

ab: makashpar thithu tiaz, itusi thithu sa puthaqian.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is Shuhut?

ab: shinshii, makashpar Shuhut a lahulahu, pangqa thuini.
en: Teacher, Shuhut has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.
Why didn’t Apin come?
She has a fever.
